answer:
The duration of a 180° pulse is given by \( t_{180} = \frac{\pi}{\gamma B_1} \), where \(\gamma\) is the gyromagnetic ratio. For protons, \(\gamma = 2.675 \times 10^8 \, \text{rad/s/T}\). Solving \( B_1 = \frac{\pi}{\gamma t_{180}} \) with \( t_{180} = 12.5 \times 10^{-6} \, \text{s} \) gives \( B_1 \approx 9.4 \times 10^{-4} \, \text{T} \), which is closest to option G.

\boxed{G}
